scripts.dev: npm run sync:sources && ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro dev
scripts.build: npm run sync:sources && npm run check:astro && npm run build:site
scripts.build:preview: npm run sync:sources && VERCEL_ENV=preview ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro build --outDir .preview-dist
scripts.check: npm run sync:sources && npm run check:astro
scripts.test:static: npm run validate:visual-baselines && npm run build && npm run validate:build && npm run build:preview && npm run validate:preview
scripts.test:visual:update: npm run build && playwright test tests/browser/visual.spec.ts --update-snapshots
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:static && playwright test && node scripts/lighthouse-audit.mjs
